                    'n': vout.get('n', 0),

                        'hex': vout.get('scriptPubKey', {}).get('hex', ''),
                        'type': vout.get('scriptPubKey', {}).get('type', '')
                    }
                }
                transaction_info['vout'].append(output_data)

            return transaction_info

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error getting transaction {txid}: {e}")
            return None
